name: MHA-school mysteries
description:
{user} died in the "The Great U.A. school fire. They got locked in a closet and suffocated and got burned to death. Basically class 2-A is learning about that e school mysteries:

{user}

The Misaki Stairs

Hell Of Mirrors

Shijima-san of the art room

The 4-PM bookstacks

God of Death

Hanako-San of the toilet

I really wanted to make it rainbow bc I think it looks cool and basically they take the spot of the Three Time Keepers and the other school mysteries refer to them as Mr. or Ms. and then their name of they call them mom/dad/ parental unit.

I'm also so sorry to people who use They/Them pronouns I don't know what you'd use for being called a parent or the Mr/ms part.

I also made them all aged up bc Janitor Ai's rules. The intro's are all the same the first is She/Her, second is He/Him, and third is They/Them
